SHORT NAME: TPL_INSRNC_CVRG_IND 

LONG NAME: TPL_INSRNC_CVRG_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0 = Medicaid/CHIP eligible individual has no TPL insurance coverage 
1 = Medicaid/CHIP eligible individual does have TPL insurance coverage 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: —
